## Checklist

- [ ] Code changes have tests where applicable
- [ ] Lint and typecheck pass locally
- [ ] No new secrets / API keys committed
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated if conventions or architecture changed
- [ ] If this introduces a new dependency: justified in description
